info.name: Accounting Hub - Inventory Out Events
info.description: Contoh request Postman untuk test flow Inventory keluar: Sales/COGS, Damaged, Sample, dan Internal Use. Setelah request masuk dengan status received, jalankan artisan validate lalu post agar jurnal dan outbox Finance Hub terbentuk.

body.raw:
{
  "client_key": "{{client_key}}",
  "client_secret": "{{client_secret}}",
  "event_name": "inventory.issue.posted",
  "event_datetime": "2026-03-28T11:00:00Z",
  "idempotency_key": "INV-ISSUE-SALES-POSTMAN-1001",
  "source_document_type": "sales_order_issue",
  "source_document_id": "SO-ISS-1001",
  "source_document_no": "SO-1001",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "payload": {
    "transaction_type": "inventory.issue.sales",
    "posting_date": "2026-03-28",
    "entry_date": "2026-03-28",
    "currency_code": "IDR",
    "exchange_rate": 1,
    "reference_no": "SO-1001",
    "description": "Inventory out for sales order SO-1001",
    "total_amount": 750000,
    "branch_code": "MAIN",
    "warehouse_code": "WH-01",
    "customer_code": "CUST-001",
    "lines": [
      {
        "item_code": "SKU-SALES-001",
        "item_name": "Produk Penjualan A",
        "qty": 10,
        "unit_cost": 75000,
        "uom": "PCS"
      }
    ]
  }
}
